brief_justification: Correct answer (storage) with valid theory-of-mind reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing object locations, character knowledge states, and visibility between characters across paragraphs; Some self-monitoring in checking whether Tom witnessed Lisa's actions; Basic verification by confirming Tom had no line-of-sight to Lisa's restocking; Acknowledges the key uncertainty of Tom's knowledge state vs actual location but doesn't explicitly flag confidence levels; Considers the alternative location (passenger seating area) and explains why Tom wouldn't know about it; Full audit trail from initial state through each paragraph with explicit derivation of Tom's belief state
